selected_realization.hud.layout_position: Top-edge anchored centered horizontal strip with corner extensions
selected_realization.hud.information_grouping: Player-centric grouping with vertical stack per player [Avatar][Name][Cash] displayed in horizontal row
selected_realization.hud.turn_number_visibility: Always visible, positioned adjacent to current player card or top-right corner
selected_realization.hud.multi_player_symmetry: All player panels displayed simultaneously in horizontal row with identical layouts
selected_realization.hud.player_color_coding: Each player assigned unique color (Red, Blue, Green, Yellow) with left border stripe and color-matched avatar on HUD panel
selected_realization.hud.transparency_opacity: HUD container at 70% opacity; active player card at 100%; inactive player cards at 60-85%
selected_realization.hud.accessibility_scaling: Base size 16sp with scaling 1x–1.5x via system settings or pinch; minimum 48px touch targets
selected_realization.hud.contrast_mode: High-contrast default (dark text on semi-transparent light panel); optional dark mode with inverted contrast
selected_realization.hud.feedback_animations: Cash count-up/down animation on change; subtle pulse/scale on highlight change; slide-in for turn transitions
selected_realization.hud.responsive_adaptation: Horizontal layout compresses (reduced padding first, then card size) before switching to 2-row vertical stack below 480px
selected_realization.hud.notification_peak: Relevant HUD element glows briefly to draw attention
selected_realization.hud.data_binding: Reactive data binding to game state model with single-frame update propagation
selected_realization.hud.refresh_trigger: Event-driven refresh on onTurnChange, onTransaction, onPropertyAction
selected_realization.hud.multiplayer_indicator: All 2-4 players visible simultaneously in HUD row with colored dot/highlight indicating active player
selected_realization.hud.popup_avoidance: HUD positioned at top edge; popups constrained to center band and lower screen area with margins
selected_realization.hud.visual_hierarchy: Tier 1 (largest, highlighted): Current player name + cash; Tier 2 (medium): Other players; Tier 3 (small): Turn number
selected_realization.hud.responsive_scale: Proportional scaling with viewport; font scales 14sp (mobile) to 18sp (tablet) to 22sp (desktop)
selected_realization.hud.animation_feedback: 200ms ease-out for state transitions; 400ms count-up/down for cash changes; 2s breathing glow for player highlight
selected_realization.hud.accessibility: Full screen-reader labels, ARIA tags, focus indicators, keyboard navigation; minimum 16sp for cash values; color-blind safe mode using shape + pattern
selected_realization.hud.layout_zones: Top zone: HUD with player cards; Center zone: Board (28 squares); Bottom zone: Controls (dice, end turn); HUD split left-right for 4 players
selected_realization.hud.visual_containment: Bounded rectangular container with 8px rounded corners and subtle drop shadow
selected_realization.hud.monopoly_identity: Classic Monopoly color palette (deep blue, gold, cream, green) with Bahnschrift/similar condensed sans-serif; subtle board-inspired decorative elements
selected_realization.hud.multiplayer_visibility: All 2-4 players visible simultaneously in HUD with expanded cards showing name + cash; state icons overlay on cards
selected_realization.hud.board_visibility_boundary: HUD height ≤5% of viewport, stopping at least 60px above board edge; all 28 squares fully visible
selected_realization.hud.popup_noninterference: HUD at lower z-index than all popups; popup system queries HUD bounds and auto-repositions to avoid overlap
selected_realization.hud.aesthetic_theme: Clean flat modern design with subtle shadows and gradients; uses classic Monopoly color palette; retains brand warmth without skeuomorphic excess
selected_realization.hud.color_coding: Red, Blue, Green, Yellow (classic assignment); HUD accent stripe matches player token color; active state uses brighter variant
selected_realization.hud.motion_responsiveness: Smooth 150-200ms transitions with easing; animations interruptible; no animation on critical-path actions (buy confirmation)
selected_realization.hud.opacity_attenuation: Inactive panels 60-85% opacity based on importance; active player at 100%; text always 100% opaque
selected_realization.hud.typography_scale: Player name 16sp bold; Cash 20sp semibold; Turn number 12sp regular; secondary elements at 85% scale; supports up to 1.5x scaling
selected_realization.hud.iconography_consistency: Uniform flat line icons with 2px stroke and rounded caps; 20px inline for cash (banknote), player (silhouette), turn (circular arrow); 32px for standalone

capability_gaps.integration_note: UX Designer and UI Programmer advocate collapsible with toggle/auto-collapse. Art Director insists non-collapsible for constant information access. Art Director's requirement prevents HUD disappearing during critical gameplay moments. UNRESOLVED if Art Director's hard constraint cannot be relaxed.

stances.ux-designer: Auto‑collapse after 5 seconds of inactivity, re‑appear on any input
